description_long: This object is a single zucchini, characterized by its elongated, cylindrical shape and slightly tapered ends. The skin is a muted green with subtle speckling and a matte finish, while the blossom end is still attached, appearing dried and beige. The surface is smooth with a few minor natural imperfections, typical of fresh zucchini. The body is firm and plump, with a gentle curve visible from certain angles. The zucchini's color is consistent throughout, with a slightly lighter green at the blossom and stem ends. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant blemishes on the exterior.
description: A plump, green zucchini with a smooth, matte surface and a dried blossom end attached. The skin is speckled and unblemished, with a gentle curve along its length.
description_view_0: The zucchini is shown with its blossom end facing up and a slight curve to the left, highlighting the smooth, speckled green skin.
description_view_1: This view presents the zucchini from a straighter angle, showing the full length and the dried blossom end directly at the top.
description_view_2: The zucchini appears slightly more curved, with the blossom end angled to the right and the body showing a consistent green color.
description_view_3: A rear view of the zucchini, displaying the straightest profile and the blossom end at the top, with minimal curvature visible.
attribute_orientation: standing upright with the blossom end facing up and the stem end down
